summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 listed open PR candidates. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned. The shard is not a dedupe cluster, so each PR is classified independently; one credential-privacy PR is routed to central security handling, and one listed PR needs human follow-up because no hydrated live artifact entry was available for its target_updated_at.

actions.reason: Related diagnostic-session recovery work, but failing proof and unique behavior surface make closure or fixed-by-candidate closeout unsafe.
Related to the unreadable tool-schema family, but draft/maintainer-owned state and missing merge preflight require keeping it non-mutating.
This is the active Discord startup-priority fix path, but merge and post-merge closeout are blocked in this plan shard and maintainer review remains pending.
Related plugin-service metadata hardening work; draft state and maintainer review prevent close or merge planning.
Related Codex policy/tool-surface work with broad draft diff and review history; keep non-mutating rather than treating it as a dedupe close or merge candidate.
Credential privacy and API/OAuth token storage concerns must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling.
Related doctor false-positive fix with proof, but waiting-on-author status and no merge/fix permission mean it should remain open.
A plausible linked fix path for #91718, but still waiting on author and not eligible for merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout in this plan shard.
Broad feature PR with its own review path; keep independent from the mixed inventory shard and avoid close/merge planning.
Needs a refreshed preflight/hydration pass for #92815 and #46184 before classification.

needs_human: #92815 requires refreshed hydrated live state because target_updated_at and linked #46184 details are unavailable in the provided compacted preflight artifact.
